description_long: This is a three-seater couch with a robust wooden frame and armrests, featuring a natural, rustic finish. The seat consists of three thick, rectangular cushions, while the backrest is composed of three matching, vertically aligned cushions, all upholstered in a textured, light brown fabric. Two cylindrical bolster pillows rest against the armrests, adding both comfort and visual interest. The back of the couch is fully enclosed with a wide wooden panel, showcasing the wood's grain and color variation. The legs are integrated into the frame, giving the couch a solid, grounded appearance. The overall design blends modern lines with rustic materials, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A rustic three-seater couch with a solid wooden frame, textured light brown upholstery, and matching cushions and bolsters. The design features a fully enclosed wooden back and integrated armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, three back cushions, and two cylindrical bolster pillows, all framed by wide wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick wooden armrest, the depth of the seat and back cushions, and the cylindrical bolster pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide, continuous wooden back panel with visible wood grain and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and bolster pillow from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose seat cushions and three loose back cushions, all rectangular and evenly spaced; two cylindrical bolster pillows placed at each end against the armrests.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is a solid, textured fabric with a subtle woven pattern, no visible decorative stitching or motifs.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are block-style, integrated into the wooden frame, short in height, and made of the same wood as the armrests and back panel.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are wide, straight, and rectangular, constructed from thick wood with a rustic finish, extending from the base to the top of the backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is high and divided into three loose, rectangular cushions, each matching the seat cushions in fabric and style, with no visible tufting or decorative elements.
